feedback.title: Model Feedback.
feedback.subtitle: Thank you for reviewing your model! Please list each item you'd like adjusted.

scopeNotice.label: Scope Notice
scopeNotice.content: Minor error fixes and physics tweaks are included in the original commission. Changes to the artwork or additions may incur extra fees. If you're unsure, go ahead and submit — I'll confirm with you before charging anything.

field.feedbackRound: Which round of feedback is this?

placeholder.expectedExample: e.g. I'd like both eyes to close completely when blinking, like in the demo at 0:20.
placeholder.currentExample: e.g. The right eye stays slightly open during blink, visible at 0:14 in the demo.
placeholder.uploadSpec: Supports images, videos, and PSD · 20MB max per file
placeholder.urlHint: For large files, share a cloud link instead

action.noIssues: Nothing to fix? → Go to Delivery Confirmation

feedback.titleHint: A title will be generated from your description

confirm.title: Delivery Confirmation.
confirm.subtitle: Thank you for trusting me with this commission — let's wrap things up together.

warning.label: Please Read Before Confirming
warning.main: By submitting this form, you confirm that this commission is complete. The final files have been delivered and reviewed.
warning.future: Any future changes, updates, or additions will be treated as a new commission — feel free to reach out by email anytime.

field.dateOptional: Optional — let me know if you have a date in mind.
field.dateDecided: I have a date in mind
field.messageOptional: Optional — anything you'd like to share.
field.messagePlaceholder: Impressions, thoughts, ideas for future commissions... all welcome.

checkbox.label: I confirm this commission is complete
checkbox.description: I've reviewed the final model and approve the delivery. I understand that any future changes will be handled as a new commission.

feedback.label: Feedback Received
feedback.title: Thank you, {name}.
feedback.message: I've received your {count} feedback items. I'll review everything carefully and get back to you in a few days.

confirm.label: Commission Complete
confirm.title: Congratulations on your new model.
confirm.message: Thank you for trusting me with this commission. It's been a pleasure working with you — I can't wait to see this character brought to life.
confirm.debutNote: I'll be cheering you on that day! If you'd like, feel free to tag me when you debut — I'd love to share the moment.
confirm.emailNote: A copy of this confirmation has been sent to your email.
confirm.futureNote: For any future commissions, feel free to reach out at {email}.
confirm.snsNote: Follow {handle} for more of my work.
